---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your proposed solution in detail -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why this one? -->

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Checklist untuk feature ini complete -->

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockup (optional)

<!-- Wireframe, screenshot, or description of desired UI -->

## 📊 Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this feature? How often? -->

- **Users affected**: [e.g. all kasir, only managers]
- **Frequency**: [e.g. daily, per shift, rare]
- **Priority**: [P0 critical / P1 high / P2 medium / P3 low]

## 🔗 Related

<!-- Related issues, PRs, atau external references -->

## 📎 Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, links, atau context lain -->
